title: Japanese Pineapple Teriyaki
description: A sweet and savory teriyaki sauce brings out the flavors of juicy pineapple, all wrapped in a delicate, fluffy pancake.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together saudia and 2 tablespoons of water to make the teriyaki sauce.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add some cooking spray.
Pour in the fluffy batter to make a thin pancake.
Cook for 2 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 1 minute.
Add diced pineapple on top of the pancake.
Drizzle the teriyaki sauce over the pineapple.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
